narrative:
Pickaway County has 38,273 registered voters, with 54.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.7 percentage points. Millennials are the largest generational cohort at 27.1% of registrants.
